text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We feel a little tired from the day's excitement on
our way home, so we decide to stop by a nearby
park to rest our feet.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm wiped out.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But I'm really happy I got to see you smile so
much!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we go play on the slide later! We
can stay till dark!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So there's plenty of time for more smiles, right?
Heeheehee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her plan out what to do in the park. After
that, I head to the vending machine to grab us
some drinks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I come back, she's nodding off.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nnngh... There's ten... carrot cakes...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Heh... mmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's having a nice dream. I'm a little
hesitant to wake her.
choice_data_list:
Let her sleep and give her a piggyback ride
home.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wha?! A hundred?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ha... ha... Hahaha! Don't mind if I do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She laughs and jumps up.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Where's all the cake?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I was?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I saw carrot cakes raining from the sky. I thought I
could gobble them all up...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, at least I got to see a nice dream! Heehee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stick around for a little while longer and head
home at sunset.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's get carrot cake next time we go out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She urges me to promise we will, and I do. We
even shake on it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mm... Trai...ner?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stirs slightly when I lift her, but just as
quickly, she falls back to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Haha... No... I can't eat... anymore...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk slowly so as not to wake her. She stays
asleep the whole way back to the dorms.
